_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Heat Map sample payload. Universe-level view: 7 entities total, 7 scored. Color zones: Red/High Risk (3 entities), Yellow/Medium Risk (2 entities), Green/Low Risk (2 entities). 0 entities unscored. Color names and classification labels are client-configured — not hardcoded.

_drillDownExamples.universe: This payload (all entities in audit universe)
_drillDownExamples.entity: If user clicks 'Global Retail Operations' → viewContext.currentLevel becomes 'entity', itemType becomes 'layer', contextPath becomes 'Global Retail Operations', colorDistribution shows layers of Global Retail Operations
_drillDownExamples.layer: If user clicks 'Sales Processes Layer' → itemType becomes 'process', contextPath becomes 'Global Retail Operations > Sales Processes Layer'
_drillDownExamples.process: If user clicks 'Customer Onboarding' → itemType becomes 'risk', contextPath becomes 'Global Retail Operations > Sales Processes Layer > Customer Onboarding'

colorDistribution.description: 7 scored entities: 3 Red (High Risk), 2 Yellow (Medium Risk), 2 Green (Low Risk).

priorityItems.description: Top 3 entities by residual score requiring immediate audit attention.
